title: Secure Secrets Management
description: Implement secure secrets management solutions like HashiCorp Vault or AWS Secrets Manager. Design systems to inject credentials at runtime, eliminating static environment variables. Prevent plaintext secret leaks in code repositories and deployment artifacts.
objectives: Implement secure secrets management solutions like HashiCorp Vault or AWS Secrets Manager.
Design systems to inject credentials at runtime, eliminating static environment variables.
Prevent plaintext secret leaks in code repositories and deployment artifacts.
